verses.1: We have heard with our ears, God;
verses.2: You drove out the nations with your hand,
verses.3: For they didn’t get the land in possession by their own sword,
verses.5: Through you, we will push down our adversaries.
verses.6: For I will not trust in my bow,
verses.7: But you have saved us from our adversaries,
verses.8: In God we have made our boast all day long.
verses.9: But now you rejected us, and brought us to dishonor,
verses.10: You make us turn back from the adversary.
verses.11: You have made us like sheep for food,
verses.12: You sell your people for nothing,
verses.13: You make us a reproach to our neighbors,
verses.14: You make us a byword among the nations,
verses.15: All day long my dishonor is before me,
verses.16: at the taunt of one who reproaches and verbally abuses,
verses.17: All this has come on us,
verses.18: Our heart has not turned back,
verses.19: though you have crushed us in the haunt of jackals,
verses.20: If we have forgotten the name of our God,
verses.22: Yes, for your sake we are killed all day long.
verses.24: Why do you hide your face,
verses.25: For our soul is bowed down to the dust.
